name: Zebra Label Printer Installation for Retail Express
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can install Zebra label printers for "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " following proper setup procedures ensuring reliable label printing for product identification and pricing. This helps optimize your retail operations by establishing professional labeling capabilities, supporting efficient inventory management, and enabling consistent product presentation across your stores."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express uses JS Print Manager to allow communication between Retail Express and your Zebra Label Printer, so you can:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create individual "}, {"text": "Templates"}, {"text": " e.g. Outlet-specific, different formats when stock is on sale or not etc."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Print Labels"}, {"text": " (Individually or in Bulk, when receiving stock, and more)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the instructions below to install and configure your Zebra Label Printer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 1 - Connect the Label Printer"}], "data-id": "step-1-connect-the-label-printer"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the instructions that came with the Label Printer to connect and install the printer on your computer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please note: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "You will need a Zebra EPL Compatible Label Printer to print Zebra labels from Retail Express (A4 Label printing is available as an alternative option). For assistance, we recommend our preferred hardware supplier, "}, {"text": "Cash Register Warehouse"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express exclusively supports\u00a0JSPrintManager 4.0 version"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Test the connection", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For printers to be compatible with the new setup, they need to be recognised by the operating system. Click the Operating system tab below for detailed instructions:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Windows PCs", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To view the list of printers on a Windows machine:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the Start button"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Type \"Printers\""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Printers & scanners", "bold": true}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppkhOEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppkhOEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage -
